description: The answer is both wrong and incomplete relative to the retrieved late-work rule.
query: How many late days are allowed for the practicum report and under what condition?

retrieved_chunks.text: Students may use two late days for the practicum report only with prior instructor approval.

final_answer: Students can submit the practicum report late whenever needed.

entries.text: Students may use two late days for the practicum report only with prior instructor approval.
